templates.template_description: Arizona Bar-compliant demand letter format for personal injury cases. Includes Arizona-specific requirements for statute of limitations (A.R.S. § 12-542), demand amounts, and medical documentation.

rules.rule_name: Arizona Statute of Limitations Section Required
rules.rule_description: Arizona demand letters must include a Statute of Limitations section citing A.R.S. § 12-542 (2-year limit for personal injury)

rule_config.error_message: Arizona demand letters must include Statute of Limitations section citing A.R.S. § 12-542

rules.rule_description: Demand letter must state a specific total dollar amount being demanded

rule_config.error_message: Demand letter must state a specific dollar amount (e.g., $100,000.00)

rules.rule_description: Demand letter must include client's full legal name

rule_config.error_message: Demand letter must include client's full name

rules.rule_description: Demand letter must include the date of the incident

rule_config.error_message: Demand letter must include date of incident (MM/DD/YYYY format)

rules.rule_description: Arizona best practice: itemize medical expenses in demand letters

rule_config.error_message: Arizona demand letters should itemize medical expenses

rules.rule_description: Professional letterhead required per Arizona Bar Rule 7.1
Demand letter should be addressed to the insurance company adjuster

rule_config.error_message: Demand letter should include insurance company name and adjuster information

rules.rule_description: If claiming lost wages, documentation should be referenced

rule_config.error_message: If claiming lost wages, include documentation reference

templates.template_description: Arizona Superior Court complaint format for civil cases, following Arizona Rules of Civil Procedure

rules.rule_description: Proper court caption format for Arizona Superior Court

rule_config.error_message: Caption must include court name, state, and county

rules.rule_description: Complaint must state jurisdiction and venue basis

rule_config.error_message: Complaint must include jurisdiction and venue statement (Rule 8, Ariz. R. Civ. P.)
Complaint must identify all parties (Rule 8, Ariz. R. Civ. P.)

rules.rule_description: Each cause of action should be numbered separately

rule_config.error_message: Causes of action should be numbered (e.g., COUNT I, COUNT II)

rules.rule_description: Complaint must include prayer for relief

rule_config.error_message: Complaint must include prayer for relief (Rule 8, Ariz. R. Civ. P.)

templates.template_description: Motion to compel discovery responses under Arizona Rules of Civil Procedure

rules.rule_description: Motion must include statement regarding good faith conference (Rule 37, Ariz. R. Civ. P.)

rule_config.error_message: Motion to compel must include good faith conference statement (Rule 37(a)(1), Ariz. R. Civ. P.)

rules.rule_description: Motion must identify specific discovery requests at issue

rule_config.error_message: Motion must identify specific discovery requests (e.g., 'Request No. 5')
Motion should include proposed order as exhibit
